key_insight: AutoDFT closes the loop for DFT workflows by using multi-agent LLM reasoning to plan, adapt, recover from failures, and revise calculations in real time.
engineering_relevance: It reduces the manual expertise needed to run reliable first-principles simulations, making DFT more practical for materials and chemistry teams.
method: Strategic planner creates a skeletal workflow with step objectives.
Step planner generates numerical parameters just in time from prior results.
Monitor-recover-reflect loop diagnoses failures, repairs them, and updates the plan when needed.
evidence_signal: On VASPBench, a benchmark of 34 tasks across 9 DFT calculation types, AutoDFT reached 94.1% task-level success with GPT-5.2 and also delivered reliable property predictions on established materials databases.
watch_item: Performance depends on the quality and reliability of LLM decisions, so robust safeguards are still needed for failure cases and high-stakes calculations.
paper_title: AutoDFT: A Closed-Loop Multi-Agent Framework for Autonomous DFT Calculations
